body.title: Add channel posts to Scraps for audit events
body.result: Channel posts added for validation failure, fuzzy escalation, and fuzzy INVALID; 4 new tests pass
body.description:
Scraps validates tickets and runs scripts silently. Add channel posts for: validation failures (with reasons), fuzzy-check escalations (when deterministic rules are insufficient), and script execution completions. Use unseen_university.channel.post_to_channel.

**Affected files:** devices/scraps/scraps_device.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — channel posts for 3 event types in scraps_device.py; OUT — no new validation logic
**Test plan:** tests/test_scraps_device.py: mock channel post, verify it fires on validation failure and fuzzy escalation
